title: CI-wired tests for new modules; extend capability-monitor coverage (REQ-H8)
description: Ensure every roadmap module ships tests wired into CI (per H-001). Extend agents/__tests__/capability-monitor.test.mjs ONLY for genuinely-uncovered paths (file-I/O / report emission) — it is already tested; do not treat it as untested. Spec: REQ-H8.
